pageDescription: Calculate the impact of interest rates on loans and investments to compare different financial products and make informed decisions

simpleVsCompound.title: Simple vs Compound Interest
simpleVsCompound.description: Simple interest is calculated on principal only; compound interest includes accumulated interest

aprVsApy.title: APR vs APY
aprVsApy.description: APR is the basic interest rate; APY includes compounding effects

rateFactors.title: Factors Affecting Rates
rateFactors.description: Credit score, loan term, and economic conditions influence interest rates

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides interest rate calculation estimates only
criticalWarningsList.actual: Actual interest rates may vary based on lender policies and market conditions

importantNotesList: APY is always higher than APR when compounding occurs more than once per year
Higher credit scores typically qualify for lower interest rates
Shorter loan terms usually have lower interest rates but higher payments
Shop around for the best rates and terms on loans and investments

messages.enterInformation: Enter your interest rate information to calculate earnings or costs
messages.resultMessage: Your interest rate calculation results are shown below

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides interest rate calculation estimates based on mathematical formulas. Actual interest rates and earnings may vary based on lender policies, fees, and market conditions not included in these calculations.

seekHelp.title: Financial Resources
seekHelp.content: For personalized interest rate analysis and financial product comparisons, consult financial advisors or loan officers with expertise in lending products and individual financial circumstances.

errors.principal: Please enter a valid principal amount
errors.interestRate: Please enter a valid annual interest rate
errors.timePeriod: Please enter a valid time period

tooltips.principal: Initial amount of loan or investment
tooltips.interestRate: Annual interest rate or expected return
tooltips.timePeriod: Length of time for interest calculation
tooltips.compounding: How often interest is compounded per year
tooltips.calculationType: Type of interest calculation to perform

enter_your_loan_information_to_calculate: Enter your loan information to calculate the interest rate
where_pmt_monthly_payment_p_principal_lo:
Where: PMT = Monthly Payment, P = Principal (loan amount), r = Monthly interest rate, n = Number
                        of payments
since_the_interest_rate_cannot_be_solved:
Since the interest rate cannot be solved algebraically from the payment formula, this calculator
                        uses the Newton-Raphson numerical method to iteratively solve for the rate that produces the
                        given payment amount.
total_interest_monthly_payment_number_of: Total Interest = (Monthly Payment × Number of Payments) - Loan Amount
